2140550.name: Repressed
2140550.description:
ABOUT THIS GAME

A war rages across the last habitable lands on Earth. The Backdoor Syndicate, a ruthless private military, enforces BioJynx’s corporate interests. The Horizon Collective, a desperate resistance, fights to break free from oppression. And in the shadows, the Drifters profit from the chaos, selling weapons, intelligence, and even lives to the highest bidder. But something else is out there, You are not alone in this fight.

Repressed is a PvPvE tactical shooter where players fight for survival in a high-risk, high-reward world. Engage in perilous warfare, scavenge for supplies, and extract with whatever you can carry—before the island, or something on it, claims you. Every decision counts. Every fight matters.

CHOOSE YOUR FACTION

  • Backdoor Syndicate – A highly skilled private military funded by BioJynx. They believe they are carrying out corporate security operations. Well-equipped and well-trained, they are the enforcers of the islands.

  • Horizon Collective – A resistance force that has had enough of the Backdoor Syndicate’s oppression. They know the truth about BioJynx and fight with guerrilla tactics, makeshift technology, and sheer determination to reclaim the islands from corporate rule.

GAMEPLAY FEATURES

  • PvPvE Warfare – Face off against rival players and AI-controlled threats in dynamic, evolving battles.

  • High-Risk Extraction – Enter the islands, secure what you can, and extract before you lose it all. But be warned—not everyone makes it out alive.ll.

  • Factions with Unique Playstyles – Each faction has its own combat philosophy, tactics, and advantages, forcing you to adapt your approach.

  • An Unpredictable Threat – The “Experiments” are watching. Learning. Waiting.

  • Black Market Economy – The Drifters’ underground network offers rare weapons, rare upgrades, and underground connections—if you’re willing to pay the price.

ARE YOU READY TO SURVIVE?

In Repressed, trust is fragile, resources are scarce, and death is permanent. Whether you're fighting for power, freedom, or profit, one thing is certain—only the strongest will make it out alive.

Wishlist now and prepare for battle!
